name: Falling for You
overview: Su Shengnan, a practical and capable gold medal female producer, hates brainless sweet dramas very much but accidentally enters a into it. She becomes the weak heroine she despises the most, is beaten by the domineering male lead. At first, she was out of place, and she turned her little white rabbit character into a female boss, but then gradually discovered Ouyang Yuchuan's kind nature. They then reaped true love across time and space.

trailers.title: Trailer | An unromantic girl had her prejudgment proven wrong in a love story | [Falling For You]
